[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Theb Tobbra''' was the First Officer of the [[Indomitable (Majestic-class)|''Indomitable'']] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].<ref name="Tyrant's Test 2">''[[Tyrant's Test]]''</ref> He had just had a new child before the [[Battle of ILC-905]], an event which added to his natural cautiousness. As the battle began, he disagreed with [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Turk Brand|Brand's]] bold plan of attack, and was sent to his quarters for the remainder of the combat.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
